raw_text:
29. Product Tooling Engineer

Job Summary  
Responsible for designing and developing tooling solutions specific to product manufacturing 
requirements.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Analyze product designs for tooling feasibility  
• Develop  tooling concepts and designs  
• Work closely with product design and manufacturing teams  
• Ensure tooling meets quality and cost targets  
• Support production and resolve tooling issues  
• Drive continuous improvement  
Required Skills  
• Product and tooling integra tion knowledge  
• CAD/design expertise  
• Manufacturing process understanding  
• Problem -solving skills  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹75,000 per month
